Author: Tori
Name: Lucky Split
Description: Lucky Split is a host-side 50/50 drawing manager for Final Fantasy XIV venues. Create reusable venue presets, record confirmed ticket purchases, assign ticket ranges automatically, track the total prize pool and payout, draw a winner, retain history, and export the ledger.
Punchline: A polished 50/50 drawing console for FFXIV venues.
Changelog: Added venue starting pots included in the full prize-pool split, expanded field guidance, and groundwork for future collaborative ticket sales.
